purpose: Durable learnings extracted from work sessions, awaiting deterministic filing into routes' Lessons From Use — the extraction leg of the build→learn→compound loop. Nothing is lost: clearly-safe candidates auto-file; judgment calls wait for Jonas's OK in the Cockpit; claims/product/legal is locked.

schema.lockedBoundary: claims/product/legal (frankly-claims-work-lock-2026-07-04.json) is never auto-filed or cockpit-filed — it requires a named reopen. Enforced fail-closed by file-learning.py via classify_action.

candidates.text: The Frankly OS runtime (scripts, system-intelligence state, and the frankly-os-site surface) all resolve paths from one workspace root, so a surface plus its live data feed must live in that same tree to be exercised end-to-end; an isolated checkout missing the untracked site folder can build the data files but cannot render or serve the surface loop. When a build spans both, target the workspace root, not the isolated checkout.
candidates.why: Hit directly this session — the isolated checkout lacked the untracked frankly-os-site/ folder, so cockpit + feed work could only be exercised against the one workspace root.

filedTo.bullet: - 2026-07-09: The Frankly OS runtime (scripts, system-intelligence state, and the frankly-os-site surface) all resolve paths from one workspace root, so a surface plus its live data feed must live in that same tree to be exercised end-to-end; an isolated checkout missing the untracked site folder can build the data files but cannot render or serve the surface loop. When a build spans both, target the workspace root, not the isolated checkout.

candidates.text: When a cockpit action's real effect is a safe-local memory write (append a dated bullet, rebuild an index) rather than a deploy or a connector write, the write-back server can perform it deterministically on approval instead of only handing back a command to run later; extend the endpoint to do the work while keeping the never-run-a-gated-action rule intact by construction.
candidates.why: The learning-capture cockpit action differs from the deploy/connector decisions the same surface already gates.
candidates.guardReason: names a gated topic (deploy/connector/paid/plugin/thread) — needs your explicit OK

filedTo.bullet: - 2026-07-09: When a cockpit action's real effect is a safe-local memory write (append a dated bullet, rebuild an index) rather than a deploy or a connector write, the write-back server can perform it deterministically on approval instead of only handing back a command to run later; extend the endpoint to do the work while keeping the never-run-a-gated-action rule intact by construction.

candidates.text: Route any candidate learning that names a gated topic (deploy, connector, paid, plugin, thread) to human approval instead of auto-filing it, even at high confidence; the presence of the gate keyword is the signal a human should look, independent of how sure the extractor is that the lesson is durable.
candidates.why: A high-confidence extractor could otherwise auto-file a lesson that names a gate; the gate keyword itself should force a human look.
candidates.guardReason: names a gated topic (deploy/connector/paid/plugin/thread) — needs your explicit OK
